root.name: Move images on Slide 5: Miami-Dade report image to left, other image to right
root.description: Evaluates whether, on Slide 5, the Miami-Dade report document image was moved to the left side and the other image was moved to the right side, with no extraneous or erroneous modifications.

children.name: Correct Images Moved to Correct Sides
children.description: Checks that the Miami-Dade report image is on the left and the chart image is on the right of slide 5.

children.name: Miami-Dade Report Image on Left Side
children.description: Checks that the Miami-Dade report image is positioned on the left half of slide 5.

children.name: Chart Image on Right Side
children.description: Checks that the chart image is positioned on the right half of slide 5.

children.name: No Unintended Changes to Slide 5 Text or Layout (besides images)
children.description: Checks that the text and non-image layout of slide 5 is unchanged except for the required image moves.

children.name: No Unintended Changes to Other Slides
children.description: Checks that no changes were made to other slides in the presentation.

metadata.task: Slide 5: Move the Miami-Dade report document image to the left side of the slide and move the graph image to the right side
